board_csa_architect.notes: No schema impact. Dropdown pattern aligns with existing TopBar color picker. RESTful logout endpoint follows existing auth patterns.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: Paranoid Mode satisfied: clears all storage artifacts, uses replace() to prevent back-nav, backend audit logging, refresh token revocation. Consider also closing SSE/WebSocket connections on logout.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: No AI/prompt impact. No VRAM usage. Auth context likely needs creation or extension. Recommend using existing useRef click-outside pattern. Clean component isolation.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: 3 AM Test passed: graceful degradation if backend logout fails. Audit log format compatible with existing logging. No infrastructure changes required.
